mapper.select: SELECT l.log_id, l.device_id, l.event_type, l.event_data, l.tenant_id, l.create_time FROM iot_device_log l WHERE l.device_id = #{deviceId} AND l.tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM iot_device_log WHERE log_id = #{logId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
DELETE FROM iot_device_log WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
